name: kc-legacy-booking
description: KC Legacy Valeting Customer Booking App

scripts.build:android: npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:ios: npx cap sync ios && cd ios/App && xcodebuild -workspace App.xcworkspace -scheme App -configuration Release -archivePath build/App.xcarchive archive -allowProvisioningUpdates && xcodebuild -exportArchive -archivePath build/App.xcarchive -exportPath build/ipa -exportOptionsPlist exportOptions.plist
